userMessage: Set CH1 200mV DC 50ohm VDD_CORE, CH2 500mV DC 50ohm VDD_IO, CH3 1V DC 50ohm VDD_PHY, CH4 2V DC 1Mohm PGOOD signal. Set trigger on CH4 rising edge 1V normal mode. Query all delay and measurement results saving to named variables. Save all 4 channels as binary files. Take screenshot.
